subject: Need a refund
body: I accidentally upgraded to the premium plan and would like my money back please.

subject: Cancel my subscription
body: I need to cancel my subscription. How do I get a refund for the remaining months?

subject: Cant log in
body: I forgot my password and the reset email never arrived. Please help!

subject: Upgrade to Pro plan
body: What features do I get with the Pro plan? Is it worth the upgrade?

subject: Export my data
body: I need to export all my data from your platform. How long does this take?

subject: Billing question
body: My card was charged twice this month. Can you check what happened?

subject: Password reset not working
body: I clicked forgot password but haven't received any email. I checked spam too.

subject: Feature request
body: Would be great if you could add dark mode to the app. Thanks!
